Dear Edwin,

please find attached a revised version of your patch.
This version keeps the support for LDAP and LEASEQUERY and fixes 
ports/121355 .

Oh, and i'm still alive, but my time is currently very limited due to 
family business.

Kind regards and thanks for the patience
Joerg

The beginning is the most important part of the work.
